svg.title: TP73 virtual long-range cDNA selector gel
svg.text: TP73 virtual long-range cDNA selector gel
Virtual local-knowledge panel: five 5-prime classes crossed with alpha, beta, gamma, delta, epsilon, and zeta 3-prime classes.
Readout lanes: alpha/gamma/zeta and beta/epsilon are separated by product size; delta uses its own junction primer.
Top grouped bars: shared 5-prime forward selector across the three 3-prime readout lanes underneath.

rect.title: L01: TP73-5p-TA-F (ACGGCTGCAGAGCGAGCTGC) x TP73-3p-alpha-gamma-zeta-R (CCCCAGGTCCTCAATGGTCA)
TAp73-alpha: 1630 bp; public record present in the bundled panel
TAp73-gamma: 1481 bp; public record present in the bundled panel
TAp73-zeta: 1342 bp; public record present in the bundled panel

svg.text: No lane is interpreted as absence: all bands are theoretical products from explicitly synthesized local cDNA hypotheses; dim/dashed or * bands are not reported in the bundled public panel.
Coordinates and products are 0-based internally in the TSV/JSON; displayed band sizes are bp lengths.
